name: Alpine Pro Tent
description: Lightweight 2-person tent rated for 4-season use.
body:
The Alpine Pro is our most versatile tent, built for backpackers who don't want to compromise on weather protection. Double-wall construction with a full-coverage rainfly keeps you dry in any conditions, while the lightweight aluminum pole system makes setup quick even in wind.

At just 4.2 lbs trail weight, the Alpine Pro won't weigh you down on long approaches. The two vestibules provide gear storage, and the interior mesh panels keep condensation under control. Rated to withstand 50mph winds and heavy snowfall.

name: Down Sleeping Bag 20F
description: 800-fill power down sleeping bag rated to 20°F for three-season backpacking.
body:
The Down 20F delivers exceptional warmth with minimal bulk, using 800-fill power goose down insulation. The mummy-cut shell reduces dead air space for faster warm-up, while the full-length draft tube seals out cold air around the zipper.

The YKK zipper runs the full length on the left side and can zip together with a right-hand bag for couples camping. Compression sack included; packs down to the size of a Nalgene bottle.

name: Ultralight Camp Stove
description: Compact canister stove that boils a liter of water in under 3 minutes.
body:
The Ultralight Camp Stove weighs just 2.8 oz and packs inside a standard mug, making it the ideal cooking solution for gram-conscious backpackers. The piezo igniter fires reliably down to freezing temperatures, and the four-pronged pot support handles everything from a small cup to a 4-liter pot.

Compatible with all standard EN417 threaded canisters. The simmer control lets you dial in a precise flame for anything from boiling water to sauteing vegetables.

name: Basecamp Lantern
description: Rechargeable LED lantern with 500 lumens and a 40-hour runtime on low.
body:
The Basecamp Lantern throws warm, diffused light across your entire campsite. The collapsible design means it packs flat for transport and expands to maximize light coverage at camp. USB-C charging means you can top it off from any power bank.

Three brightness levels plus a red night-vision mode make it versatile for reading, cooking, and navigating at night without ruining your dark adaptation. IPX4 water resistance handles rain and splashes.

name: Summit Sleeping Pad
description: Inflatable sleeping pad with R-value 4.5 for three-season comfort.
body:
The Summit pad delivers serious insulation at a fraction of the weight of foam alternatives. The internal baffles inflate quickly and create a stable sleeping surface that doesn't roll or shift during the night. The tapered shape reduces weight without sacrificing shoulder comfort.

Deflation is fast thanks to the large-diameter valve — just fold and roll, no stuffing required. Includes a stuff sack and repair kit.

name: Trailrunner GTX Boots
description: Waterproof hiking boots with Vibram outsoles for all-terrain grip.
body:
Built for serious hikers who need reliable footwear in any conditions. The Trailrunner GTX features a waterproof-breathable membrane that keeps your feet dry without overheating. The Vibram Megagrip outsole provides exceptional traction on wet rock, loose gravel, and muddy trails.

The EVA midsole delivers cushioning for long days, while the reinforced toe cap protects against rocks and roots. Available in regular and wide widths to ensure a perfect fit.

name: Osprey 50L Backpack
description: Feature-rich 50-liter pack with integrated rain cover and hipbelt pockets.
body:
The Osprey 50L is designed around an adjustable torso length system that fits a wide range of body types. The suspended mesh backpanel keeps airflow moving between the pack and your back, reducing sweat buildup on hot days.

The floating top lid converts to a summit pack for day hikes from basecamp. Front stash pocket, two hipbelt pockets, and a sleeping bag compartment round out the organizational features. Lifetime guarantee.

name: Carbon Trekking Poles
description: Ultralight carbon fiber poles with cork grips and interchangeable tips.
body:
At just 9.5 oz per pole, the Carbon Trekking Poles are designed for performance hikers who want to minimize pack weight without sacrificing function. The 100% carbon fiber shaft absorbs trail vibration, reducing fatigue on long descents.

The ergonomic cork grips wick moisture and mold to your hand shape over time. Ships with both rubber and carbide tips, plus trekking baskets and snow baskets. Three-section design folds to 24 inches for easy packing.

name: Trail Gaiters
description: Low-cut nylon gaiters that keep debris out of your shoes on brushy trails.
body:
The Trail Gaiters snap on in seconds and protect against pebbles, pine needles, and mud on overgrown trails. The stretch nylon construction moves with your foot, and the instep strap holds them securely in place over your boot.

Compatible with most low and mid-cut hiking boots and trail runners. Machine washable. Sold in pairs.

name: Fleece Midlayer Jacket
description: 200-weight grid fleece jacket with hand pockets and a full-length zip.
body:
The Fleece Midlayer is the workhorse of any layering system. Made from 200-weight recycled polyester grid fleece, it traps body heat efficiently while remaining breathable enough for active use. The athletic cut works as both a standalone layer and under a shell.

Two hand pockets and a chest zip pocket provide storage without bulk. Flatlock seams eliminate pressure points under a pack shoulder strap. Machine wash, tumble dry.

name: Velocity Carbon Road Bike
description: Full carbon frame road bike with Shimano 105 groupset.
body:
The Velocity Carbon delivers race-level performance at an accessible price point. The full carbon monocoque frame weighs just 980g and features our aero tube profiles for reduced drag at speed. The Shimano 105 R7000 groupset provides precise, reliable shifting across the 22-speed range.

Equipped with tubeless-ready carbon wheels and 28mm tires for a balance of speed and comfort. Internal cable routing keeps the cockpit clean, and the threaded bottom bracket makes maintenance straightforward.

name: MIPS Road Helmet
description: Aerodynamic road helmet with MIPS brain protection system and 20 vents.
body:
The MIPS Road Helmet is engineered for cyclists who take safety as seriously as performance. The MIPS Brain Protection System adds a low-friction layer that redirects rotational energy during angled impacts, reducing the risk of brain injury. Twenty large vents channel airflow through internal channels for exceptional cooling.

The 250g weight is competitive with helmets at twice the price, and the in-mold polycarbonate shell adds structural rigidity. The magnetic buckle closes with one hand.

name: Rechargeable Bike Lights Set
description: USB-C rechargeable front and rear light set with Daytime Running modes.
body:
The Rechargeable Bike Lights Set delivers 800 lumens up front and a 100-lumen rear flash to keep you visible in all conditions. Both lights charge via USB-C and share a cable, so you only need one charger. The front light attaches and detaches in seconds without tools.

The included remote lets you switch modes without taking your hands off the bars. Waterproof to IPX6. Battery level indicator shows remaining charge at a glance.

name: Merino Cycling Bib Shorts
description: 4-way stretch bib shorts with merino chamois pad for all-day comfort.
body:
The Merino Cycling Bib Shorts combine a technical Lycra outer with a merino wool chamois pad that naturally regulates temperature and resists odor. The 4-way stretch fabric moves with you in every position, and the bib straps distribute pressure evenly across your shoulders.

Flatlock stitching prevents chafing on long rides. Leg grippers keep the hem in place without binding. Available in men's and women's specific fits.

name: Cloudstrike Running Shoes
description: Lightweight daily trainer with responsive foam and breathable mesh upper.
body:
The Cloudstrike is designed for runners who want a versatile daily trainer that can handle everything from easy recovery runs to tempo workouts. The nitrogen-infused foam midsole delivers a snappy, responsive ride without sacrificing cushioning on longer efforts.

The engineered mesh upper provides targeted breathability and a secure midfoot wrap. A rubber outsole with strategic placement offers durability where you need it while keeping weight to a minimum at 8.5oz.

name: Trail Runner Pro
description: Aggressive trail running shoe with Vibram outsole and rock plate protection.
body:
The Trail Runner Pro is built for technical singletrack where grip and protection matter most. The Vibram Litebase outsole delivers confident traction on wet roots, loose dirt, and rocky terrain, while the integrated TPU rock plate shields your foot from sharp impacts.

The drainage ports and quick-dry mesh upper handle stream crossings without holding water. The wider toe box provides natural foot splay on uneven ground. Suitable for races and long training days.

name: GPS Running Watch
description: Multisport GPS watch with heart rate monitor, route navigation, and 40-hour battery.
body:
The GPS Running Watch tracks every metric that matters — pace, heart rate, cadence, elevation gain, and recovery time — and displays them on a high-contrast display you can read in direct sunlight. The built-in barometric altimeter gives accurate elevation data without relying on GPS signals alone.

Load courses from your phone and follow turn-by-turn navigation on the wrist. The 40-hour GPS battery easily handles ultramarathons. Swimproof to 50 meters.

name: Compression Running Socks
description: Graduated compression socks with targeted cushioning zones for runners.
body:
The Compression Running Socks deliver 15-20mmHg graduated compression that increases blood flow and reduces muscle fatigue on long runs. The merino/nylon blend provides natural odor control and softness against the skin.

Strategic cushioning zones at the heel and forefoot absorb impact without adding bulk, and the anatomical left/right design ensures a precise fit. Machine washable, maintains compression through 50+ washes.

name: Running Hydration Vest
description: Low-profile 8L hydration vest with two 500mL soft flasks and gear pockets.
body:
The Running Hydration Vest carries everything you need for a long trail run without bouncing or chafing. The elastic body conforms closely to minimize pack movement, and two front pockets hold the included 500mL soft flasks within easy reach while running.

The 8-liter main compartment fits a shell layer, food, and emergency gear. Trekking pole loops secure your poles during technical scrambles. Compatible with 1.5L and 2L reservoirs (sold separately).

name: Apex Climbing Harness
description: Lightweight sport climbing harness with gear loops and adjustable leg loops.
body:
The Apex harness is built for sport climbers who value comfort on long routes. The FrameFit construction uses a laminated foam frame that distributes weight evenly across your waist and legs, eliminating pressure points during extended hangs.

Four molded gear loops provide easy access to your rack, and the speed-adjust buckle system lets you dial in the fit in seconds. Tie-in points are reinforced with abrasion-resistant fabric for extended durability.

name: 60m Dry Rope
description: 9.8mm x 60m dry-treated single rope for sport and trad climbing.
body:
The 60m Dry Rope uses a Unicore construction that bonds the sheath and core together, preventing the sheath from slipping and reducing middle-of-the-rope wear. The dry treatment repels water in wet conditions and resists dirt absorption, extending the rope's working life.

A 9.8mm diameter is the sweet spot between durability and handling — thin enough to run smoothly through devices and belay plates, thick enough for aggressive use on sharp limestone. UIAA certified.

name: Rock Climbing Shoes
description: Neutral-fit climbing shoes with sticky rubber sole for gym and outdoor sport routes.
body:
The Rock Climbing Shoes offer an ideal entry into performance footwear for climbers moving past beginner slippers. The slightly downturned last improves performance on face holds and pockets without the discomfort of aggressive shoes on longer routes.

The 4mm Evo rubber sole delivers the sensitivity needed to feel small holds, while maintaining enough thickness for extended wear. Micro-fleece lining reduces moisture buildup. Half-size down recommended for a snug but comfortable fit.

name: Chalk Bag with Belt
description: Cylindrical chalk bag with stiff rim, fleece lining, and adjustable belt.
body:
The Chalk Bag opens wide for easy access and stays open during use thanks to the stiff rim. The soft fleece lining distributes chalk evenly across your fingers with each dip, and the draw-cord closure keeps chalk in when you're moving between routes.

The zippered exterior pocket fits a phone or small essentials. The adjustable nylon belt fits waists from 24 to 44 inches and passes through standard pant belt loops for gym use.

name: Locking Carabiner Set
description: Set of 4 screwgate locking carabiners in HMS, oval, and D-shapes.
body:
The Locking Carabiner Set covers the essential shapes for building anchors, clipping to protection, and organizing your gear. The HMS pear-shaped gate is sized for a Munter hitch belay, the oval works with pulleys and racks, and two asymmetric D-shapes are lightweight enough to carry in quantity.

All four are rated to 24kN major axis, 7kN minor axis, and 7kN open gate. The screwgate sleeves lock positively with a quarter turn. Forged 7075 aluminum. CE and UIAA certified.
